description_long: This is a modern, two-seater chaise with a dark wooden frame and deep green upholstered cushions. The frame features straight, angular lines with open slats on the back and sides, giving it a minimalist yet sturdy appearance. The seat and backrest are both generously padded, with the back cushion slightly angled for ergonomic support. Both armrests are flat and wide, matching the geometric style of the frame. The legs are straight and robust, providing stable support for the entire structure. The upholstery is smooth and solid-colored, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
description: A modern, dark wood-framed chaise with deep green, smooth upholstered cushions and straight, open-sided armrests.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide seat, thick back cushion, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the seat, angled back cushion, and the open slat design of the armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open slatted backrest and the full width of the back cushion.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the armrest and cushion profile.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is a single, wide, slightly angled cushion supported by a dark wooden frame with vertical slats. It is plain, without tufting or decorative elements, and extends the full width of the seat.
attribute_armrest_presence: Both left and right armrests are present, constructed from dark wood with open slats and a flat, angular design.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, square, and made of dark wood, matching the rest of the frame. They are simple and unadorned, providing a sturdy base.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid dark green fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two main cushions: one thick seat cushion and one slightly angled back cushion, both loose and sized to fit the frame precisely without additional layering.
